# VER-QUIC-RFC9001-0008 - QUIC RFC 9001 Non-Retained Stateless Reset Suppression Verification

## Scope

Verify the suppressive no-retained-route/no-token cell after AEAD-limit terminal discard, including unknown-route suppression, missing-token suppression, and the boundary where retained-route emission still remains available when route and token match.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0009

## Verification Method

Focused requirement-home execution, helper suppression tests, deterministic fuzz coverage for retained-route and token presence, BenchmarkDotNet Dry coverage for retained-route lookup miss and no-token miss, and SpecTrace render/check.

## Preconditions

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0006 remains the retained-route response floor baseline.
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0007 remains the malformed-formatting suppression baseline.
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0008 remains the known-token loop-suppression baseline.
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0009 defines the suppressive no-retained-route/no-token cell being verified.

## Procedure or Approach

- Run focused requirement-home tests for REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0009.
- Run the retained-route, malformed-formatting, and known-token matrix guards for REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0006 through REQ-QUIC-RFC9001-S6P6-0008.
- Run `dotnet run -c Release --project benchmarks/Incursa.Quic.Benchmarks.csproj -- --job Dry --filter "*QuicStatelessResetBenchmarks*" --artifacts artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9001-s6p6-non-retained-suppression/BenchmarkDotNet.Artifacts` to refresh the permanent stateless-reset benchmark evidence.
- Render the touched SpecTrace Markdown views from JSON and run the render check for those scopes.
- Run `git diff --check` before committing the slice.

## Expected Result

Later packets that do not resolve to a retained route or that resolve only to route state without a remembered token return TokenUnavailable and suppress stateless-reset response emission. The retained-route positive floor continues to emit when route, token, and gates permit emission, the known-token loop-suppression cell remains separate, and the permanent benchmark suite preserves the retained-route lookup miss and no-token miss paths without claiming a broader ambiguity model.

- src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntimeEndpoint.cs
- src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionEndpointHost.cs
- src/Incursa.Quic/QuicListenerHost.cs
